note: Unified registry for the SavingsRE Top Investments system. ONE renderer (top3.html) and ONE hub (index.html) read this file. To add a list/segment: add an entry under 'lists' (and to 'order'), then drop a <key>__<date>.json public snapshot + a <key>__index.json. No HTML changes. 'collection' groups lists on the hub; 'template' selects the card layout in the renderer. Public data is DISGUISED (area/type/price band/cap band); exact data lives only in the private ledger.

templates.mls-financial: Disguised income-property card (banded from MLS NOI/cap). Address/MLS/exact $ stripped to the ledger.
templates.curated-generic: Disguised curated card: submarket + profile + price band + cap band, no address. Exact data on request.
templates.str-airbnb: Disguised short-term-rental card: area + type + price band + est. STR yield band. Revenue ESTIMATED from market ADR x occupancy.

weekly-top3.label: This Week's Top 3 by Segment
weekly-top3.blurb: Each week we rank the best-value active income properties by reported NOI cap rate, rent-to-value upside, and ownership fit. Pick a segment to see this week's leaders — and browse past weeks.

curated.label: Curated Collections — Multifamily, Larger & NNN
curated.blurb: Hand-screened from Crexi, LoopNet and broker networks. Generic by design — reach out for addresses, financials, and off-market deals.

mf-upto3m-east.label: Multifamily — Up to $3M
mf-upto3m-east.tagline: Income Properties · 2–4 Units up to $3M · East Palm Beach & Broward

airbnb-str-east.label: Airbnb / Short-Term Rental
airbnb-str-east.tagline: Top projected-STR-yield homes & condos · Delray, Deerfield, Ft. Lauderdale, Pompano, Hollywood, Lake Worth Beach, Lauderdale-by-the-Sea

high-yield-sfl.label: High-Yield Multifamily — 8%+ Cap
high-yield-sfl.tagline: Top 5 · South Florida · 5–25 units · stabilized & light value-add

large-statewide.label: Larger Investments — 40+ Units
large-statewide.tagline: Top 10 · Statewide · 7%+ in-place or deep value

nnn-fl.tagline: Top triple-net (NNN) single-tenant deals statewide · under $10M · ranked by cap rate
